arts.ttl: Lazio-Como to open the second half of the season
arts.sum: Only Verona (eight) have conceded more goals than Lazio in the first quarter of an hour of games in the current Serie A season (seven, including one from Pellegrini in the derby), but Como have only scored one goal in that period (a joint-low with Bologna, Lecce and Turin). Lazio have won six of the eight home matches against Como in Serie A (1D, 1L), scoring at least two goals per game on six occasions in this period (average of 2.3 goals scored per match).

arts.ttl: Gustav Isaksen in quickfire Celtic transfer turnaround as brutal Lazio cull sees 'boring' jab forgotten
